CallTranscriptChapter.description: A summary chapter for a call transcript.

type.description: Clipboard item type. The member value is a v1 compatibility spelling for a workspace member item.

item_count.description: Number of items in the clipboard.

ConversationMessagesResponse.description: Conversation messages response with the standard public data envelope plus legacy top-level aliases.

CreateConversationMessageBody.description: Create a conversation message. The authenticated API-key workspace member is the author; author_id is accepted only for legacy body compatibility and is ignored.

explicit_context_message_ids.description: Message identifiers to include as explicit context.

image_urls.description: Image URLs to attach to the message.

file_ids.description: Uploaded file identifiers to attach to the message.

suppressed_link_preview_urls.description: URLs whose link previews should be suppressed.

replied_to_message_id.description: Message identifier this message replies to.

client_request_id.description: Legacy body idempotency value. Public v1 clients should use the Idempotency-Key header.

author_id.description: Ignored legacy body author workspace member identifier. The authenticated API-key workspace member is always the author.

CreateConversationMessageResponse.description: Create-message response with the standard public data envelope plus legacy compatibility aliases.

legacy_data.description: Legacy extended conversation message. New clients should read the standard data message result.

type.description: Stable public conversation type. Legacy /api/v1 compatibility routes may still emit the internal integer value until migrated.

LegacyErrorResponse.description: Current compatibility error envelope used by legacy /api/v1 routes.

LegacyPageInfo.description: Current compatibility pagination metadata with camelCase field names.

hasNextPage.description: Whether another page exists after this page.

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether another page exists before this page.

MemberResult.description: Workspace member result visible to the authenticated API key. The v1 schema name is a compatibility spelling for this resource.

MessageResult.description: Public message result. This intentionally omits reply lineage fields such as thread_root_id and replied_to_message_id; use the thread replies route and its thread_root_id payload field to validate thread grouping.

image_urls.description: Image URLs extracted from the message.

MessageResultResponse.description: Message detail response with the standard public data envelope plus legacy top-level aliases.

image_urls.description: Image URLs extracted from the message.

PublicApiPageInfo.description: Target public API pagination metadata with snake_case field names.

has_next_page.description: Whether another page exists after this page.

has_previous_page.description: Whether another page exists before this page.

RecordTaskUpdateBody.description: Record a task worklog/checkpoint update and optional task/resource changes.

expected_state_version.description: Optimistic task state version expected by the caller.

SearchCallsResponse.description: Search calls response. Results are returned in data.items; top-level items is a compatibility alias.

data.description: Standard public response data. New clients should read data.items.

items.description: Compatibility alias for data.items. New clients should read data.items.

SearchConversationsResponse.description: Search conversations response. Results are returned in data.items; top-level items is a compatibility alias.

data.description: Standard public response data. New clients should read data.items.

items.description: Compatibility alias for data.items. New clients should read data.items.

SearchMembersResponse.description: Search workspace members response. Results are returned in data.items; top-level items is a compatibility alias.

data.description: Standard public response data. New clients should read data.items.

items.description: Compatibility alias for data.items. New clients should read data.items.

SearchMessagesResponse.description: Search messages response. Results are returned in data.items; top-level items is a compatibility alias.

data.description: Standard public response data. New clients should read data.items.

items.description: Compatibility alias for data.items. New clients should read data.items.

SearchTasksResponse.description: Search tasks response. Results are returned in data.items; top-level items is a compatibility alias.

data.description: Standard public response data. New clients should read data.items.

items.description: Compatibility alias for data.items. New clients should read data.items.

TaskEntryAuthorKind.description: Task entry author kind. The member value is a v1 compatibility spelling for a human workspace member author.

ThreadRepliesResponse.description: Thread replies response with the standard public data envelope plus legacy top-level aliases. The response-level thread_root_id identifies the requested root; individual MessageResult items do not expose reply lineage metadata.

ThreadRepliesData.description: Standard thread replies payload. Use thread_root_id here to validate thread grouping; individual MessageResult items intentionally omit thread_root_id and replied_to_message_id.

AndoApiKey.description: Workspace API key. Current accepted keys use the ando_sk_ prefix.
